title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 71.150 - Property qualifications for officers not required
text:
71.150.  Property qualifications for officers not required. — No property qualification shall be required of any person to render him eligible to any office in any city or incorporated town.
(RSMo 1939 § 7290, A. 1949 H.B. 2023) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7139; 1919 § 8588; 1909 § 9476
